arts.ttl: Why Vinicius Junior, Rodrygo Aren't Playing for Real Madrid vs. Mallorca
arts.sum: Real Madrid must face Mallorca without Vinícius Júnior and Rodrygo, who are both sidelined with injuries.

arts.ttl: Official: Real Madrid name XI to face Mallorca

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Mallorca LIVE: Latest updates as Los Blancos face must-win scenario
arts.sum: Real Madrid enter Wednesday's match seven points back of rivals Barcelona following their 4-3 defeat in El Clasico on Sunday. The result all but means Carlo Ancelotti's men will relinquish their LaLiga crown to the Blaugrana, who can clinch the title against city rivals Espanyol on Thursday or earlier if Los Blancos fail to defeat Mallorca.
